recommendations.title: Bird People
recommendations.overview: An overstressed American businessman and a French chambermaid make a connection at an airport hotel in Paris.

recommendations.title: Balkan Line

recommendations.title: Die Hard 2
recommendations.overview: One year after his heroics in Los Angeles, John McClane is an off-duty cop who is the wrong guy in the wrong place at the wrong time. On a snowy Christmas Eve, as he waits for his wife's plane to land at Washington Dulles International Airport, terro

recommendations.title: Jet Lag
recommendations.overview: At Charles de Gaulle Airport in Paris, a beautician on her way to a new job in Mexico accidentally meets a cook who is on his way back from America. Labor strikes, bad weather, and pure luck cause the two of them to share a room overnight at the airp

recommendations.title: Ernest & Celestine
recommendations.overview: Celestine is a little mouse trying to avoid a dental career while Ernest is a big bear craving an artistic outlet. When Celestine meets Ernest, they overcome their natural enmity by forging a life of crime together.
recommendations.director: Vincent Patar, Benjamin Renner, Stéphane Aubier

recommendations.title: Daddio
recommendations.overview: A woman taking a cab ride from JFK airport engages in a conversation with the driver about the important relationships in their lives.

recommendations.title: The Assault
recommendations.overview: December 1994. On Saturday 24th, four GIA terrorists hijack an Air France A300 Airbus, bound for Paris, with 227 passengers on board, at the Algiers airport.

recommendations.title: The Terminal
recommendations.overview: An Eastern European tourist unexpectedly finds himself stranded in JFK airport, and must take up temporary residence there.

recommendations.title: Looking for Teddy
recommendations.overview: A father enlists the help of an airport employee on a quest to find his daughter's teddy.

recommendations.title: Last Call for Istanbul
recommendations.overview: A chance meeting at the airport leads two married people to an unforgettable night full of excitement, desire, and temptation in New York City.
